definition: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces the concrete byte literal that I2S would retain with a <GAP> placeholder, directly destroying the byte-exact operand required by a single-byte equality gate.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces the I2S-planted concrete byte (color_type=0x03) with a <GAP> abstraction; structural recombination mutators then prevent the exact palette byte from being retained, so the single-byte fix that bare cmplog holds is erased.
signature.one_line: structural generalization erases the I2S-planted palette color_type byte

analysis.summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 3 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) for png_read_end to take the true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same byte-precise condition (color_type byte at 0x19 == 0x03) must survive intact in the produced input; the structural/generalization machinery that distinguishes grimoire from cmplog must not perturb or generalize away that exact byte.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog (no generalization/Grimoire mutators) keeps the I2S-planted color_type=03 byte intact and resolved the branch in 9/10 trials with avg hitcount 7; the byte-diff confirms W bytes 03(.)x4 fixed at offset 0x19.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: grimoire shares the full cmplog I2S stack yet loses (resolved 1/10, blocked 9/10), so the divergence is attributable to grimoire's added GeneralizationStage + Grimoire structural mutators; its grimoire-blocking seed at offset 0x19 carries non-palette bytes, indicating the generalization/structural recombination disrupts the byte-precise palette color_type that bare I2S would otherwise plant and retain.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire structural: grimoire adds GeneralizationStage (replacing concrete byte runs with <GAP>) plus Grimoire string/structural mutators on top of the identical I2S stage; that structural recombination dilutes the per-byte I2S fix of the color_type field, so the single-technique delta (grimoire_structural) actively penalizes resolution relative to plain cmplog.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker at pngread.c:787 tests color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE.
cmplog winner seeds carry 03 at offset 0x19 while losers carry non-palette bytes there.
cmplog winner-resolving seeds take the true branch.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for one CMP operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S; it can only mutate via havoc/token stack.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog beats naive at this branch with prob_div 0.90.
grimoire shares the full cmplog I2S stack and adds generalization plus Grimoire mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
grimoire builds on the full cmplog stack —
it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the
`I2SRandReplace` (i2s) stage — and ADDS a `GeneralizationStage` plus
Grimoire structural mutators.

evidence_trail.claim: The single-technique delta for grimoire vs cmplog is the added generalization plus Grimoire mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The single-technique delta is therefore
`grimoire` vs `cmplog` (both have I2S; grimoire adds generalization +
Grimoire mutators), not vs naive.

evidence_trail.claim: GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`GeneralizationStage`
replaces concrete byte runs in a corpus entry with `<GAP>` placeholders

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog wins over grimoire at this branch with prob_div 0.80.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==PALETTE where naive resolves the branch as fast as cmplog (i.e. the single color_type byte is reachable by blind havoc), which would refute that I2S byte-substitution is what gives cmplog its edge.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The grimoire>loss attribution to GeneralizationStage perturbation is inferential — both grimoire and cmplog have I2S, so I cannot directly observe in the seeds why grimoire fails to retain the color_type=3 byte, only that it shares the I2S stack yet loses.

signature.mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage abstracts the concrete tab byte (0x09) to a <GAP> placeholder and adds re-execution overhead; both effects destroy the byte-exact literal that I2S would retain, causing the tab gate to remain unresolved.
signature.one_line: GeneralizationStage erases the exact tab byte and adds throughput cost

analysis.summary_one_line: A well-formed XML comment opener <!-- whose body contains a literal 0x09 tab byte, so the loop's third disjunct fires.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A byte-exact tab (0x09) preserved inside a concrete <!-- comment body; the gate rewards a specific literal byte rather than a generalizable structural token.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog keeps the concrete bytes its I2S stage placed, so the exact 0x09 survives and the True side fires (resolved 8/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: grimoire runs the same I2S stage but its GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders and spends extra re-execution validating those generalizations; for a byte-exact 0x09 gate the generalized tokens erase the specific tab and the throughput tax leaves grimoire blocked 9/10 — both loser-blocking grimoire seeds were produced by Grimoire structural mutators (GrimoireExtensionMutator).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire structural (anti-direction): grimoire's GeneralizationStage + structural mutators abstract away the concrete tab byte and add re-execution cost, so the structural technique HURTS on a byte-exact literal gate where plain cmplog's concrete bytes win.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the third disjunct *in == 0x09 of the comment-content while loop, whose globally blocked side is True.
0x09 is below the 0x20 lower bound of the second disjunct, so the byte must be exactly a tab to reach the True side.
naive_ctx is the winner and naive the loser in the ctx_coverage pair, with naive_ctx resolving 10/10 and naive only 2/10.
Winner-resolving seeds are all naive_ctx and carry 0x09 tab bytes alongside comment-opener bytes.
Loser-blocking naive seeds contain '--' runs but the dumped bytes show no tab inside a comment body.
naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the call context into the edge-map index so the same edge is recorded at different slots per call path.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
folds it into the edge-map index, so the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for an operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog beats naive on the I2S delta, resolving 8/10 vs naive's 2/10.
naive has no I2S and only havoc+token mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire loses to cmplog despite both running the I2S stage; grimoire adds GeneralizationStage and Grimoire mutators.
grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders by repeated re-execution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: replaces concrete byte runs in a corpus entry with `<GAP>` placeholders

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire incurs extra executions during generalization, each gap validated by a re-run.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
plus extra executions
during generalization (each candidate gap is validated by a re-run).

evidence_trail.claim: The loser-blocking grimoire seeds were produced by Grimoire structural mutators.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic comment-content gate testing a byte-exact 0x09 tab where cmplog does NOT outpace naive, and grimoire matches or beats cmplog, and naive_ctx shows no advantage over naive — i.e. all three deltas vanish, showing the divergence is not technique-driven.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The cmplog>naive I2S attribution is unverified in lineage because only naive_ctx winner seeds are stored, so I2S's role rests on mechanism reasoning rather than a confirmed dash-row ancestor.
